clusters.rationale: Sidebar.stories.tsx directly imports Sidebar.tsx where DEFAULT_REF_ID was renamed from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval'; any story that renders the Sidebar component or passes a ref ID may reflect this value change.
Refs.stories.tsx stories exercise ref-aware rendering and are likely to receive DEFAULT_REF_ID as a prop or compare against it, making them the most sensitive to the renamed constant.
Search and SearchResults stories are directly modified (Search.stories.tsx imports Sidebar.tsx transitively) and may use DEFAULT_REF_ID when scoping search to the internal ref.
Tree.stories.tsx is a directly modified file; TreeNode stories are related via shared sidebar imports; both may render items keyed under the internal ref ID.
Filter, FilterPanel, and Explorer stories are related via the sidebar import graph but do not directly render Sidebar.tsx; they are affected because a shared module re-exports DEFAULT_REF_ID.
Catch-all for top-level manager/Main integration stories that are transitively affected through the full sidebar import chain; least likely to visibly expose the constant rename.
